description: Sponsored deal with a contract silent on disclosure flags ftc_disclosure at_risk and cites an FTC source.

input.contract_text: Creator will produce one sponsored video for Brand for a fee of 2,000 USD. Brand receives a 6-month social license.

expect.header: starts with RESEARCH NOTES. NOT LEGAL ADVICE.
expect.flags: includes requirement ftc_disclosure with status at_risk and sources including ftc-disclosures-101 or ftc-endorsement-guides

prohibit: citing a source id not in the registry

description: Perpetual worldwide rights for a flat fee flags both perpetual_usage_flat_fee and usage_rights_conflict.

input.contract_text: Creator grants Brand a perpetual, worldwide, royalty-free license to use the content in any medium. Flat fee 500 USD.

expect.flags: includes perpetual_usage_flat_fee (at_risk) and usage_rights_conflict; usage flag cites us-copyright-basics

description: A non-sponsored, non-gifted, non-affiliate arrangement marks the FTC flag not_applicable with a reason.

input.contract_text: Two parties agree to co-produce a video with no compensation, product, or affiliate relationship.

expect.flags: ftc_disclosure status not_applicable with a stated reason; missing_payment_terms may be flagged

prohibit: marking ftc_disclosure at_risk when there is no material connection

description: Neither contract_text nor deal_id returns a structured error.

expect.message: present, asks for contract_text or deal_id
